predicate ValidPair(a: int, b: int, x: int)\n{\n  1 <= a <= x &&\n  1 <= b <= x &&\n  a % b == 0 &&\n  a * b > x &&\n  a / b < x\n}\n\nghost predicate SolutionExists(x: int)\n{\n  exists a :: exists b :: ValidPair(a, b, x)\n}\n\nmethod EhabConstruction(x: int) returns (a: int, b: int, found: bool)\n  ensures found ==> ValidPair(a, b, x)\n  ensures !found ==> !SolutionExists(x)\n{\n  a := 0;\n  b := 0;\n  found := false;\n\n  var ai := 1;\n  while ai <= x && !found\n    invariant 1 <= ai\n    invariant found ==> ValidPair(a, b, x)\n    invariant !found ==> forall a', b' :: 1 <= a' < ai && 1 <= b' <= x ==> !ValidPair(a', b', x)\n  {\n    var bi := 1;\n    while bi <= ai && !found\n      invariant 1 <= bi\n      invariant found ==> ValidPair(a, b, x)\n      invariant !found ==> forall a', b' :: 1 <= a' < ai && 1 <= b' <= x ==> !ValidPair(a', b', x)\n      invariant !found ==> forall b' :: 1 <= b' < bi ==> !ValidPair(ai, b', x)\n    {\n      if ai % bi == 0 && ai * bi > x && ai / bi < x {\n        a := ai;\n        b := bi;\n        found := true;\n      }\n      bi := bi + 1;\n    }\n    if !found {\n      // For b' > ai: since 1 <= ai < b', ai % b' == ai >= 1 != 0, so ValidPair is false\n      assert forall b' :: ai < b' <= x ==> !ValidPair(ai, b', x) by {\n        forall b' | ai < b' <= x\n          ensures !ValidPair(ai, b', x)\n        {\n          assert ai % b' == ai;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    ai := ai + 1;\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}},{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01EigfE7osPLmg6LVGRFgJJN","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Ejcn9RC1ckT6uf8jsSaKvB","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"/opt/homebrew/Cellar/dotnet@8/8.0.124/libexec/dotnet
